channel.title: Security on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: Azure mandatory multifactor authentication: Phase 2 starting in October 2025
item.description:
Microsoft Azure will begin enforcing mandatory multi-factor authentication at the Azure Resource Manager layer starting October 1, 2025, per a post on the Microsoft Security Blog.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Upgrade existing Azure Gen1 VMs to Gen2-Trusted launch
item.description:
Azure announced general availability of the ability to upgrade existing Gen1 virtual machines to Gen2-Trusted Launch. The capability enables Trusted Launch on previously deployed Gen1 VMs to improve foundational VM security.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: Remote GitHub MCP Server is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub announced that the remote GitHub MCP Server is now generally available, with OAuth-based authentication, expanded tooling, and strengthened security guardrails to support production use.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: CodeQL 2.22.4 adds support for Go 1.25 and accuracy improvements
item.description:
GitHub released CodeQL 2.22.4 (2025-09-02), adding support for Go 1.25 and delivering accuracy improvements to its static analysis engine used by GitHub Code Scanning to find and remediate security issues.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files file access logs
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files file access logs are now generally available, providing detailed visibility into file-level operations for SMB, NFSv4.1, and dual-protocol volumes. This feature helps organizations improve their security monitoring.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Storage Discovery
item.description:
Azure Storage Discovery is now in public preview, offering enterprise-wide visibility into Azure Storage data. It enables deep analysis of capacity and activity to optimize costs, enhance security, and improve operations.

  • Source: Azure Updates
